<!-- Headless two-column question/answer form, all <td> (no th anywhere, so
     the key-value detector cannot see it). Col 0 is the descriptor column;
     one answer cell is blank, which is the gappy-value witness that separates
     this shape from a dense two-column data table. -->
<table><tbody><tr><td>Has the work been publicly disclosed? If so, indicate when and where:</td><td>No</td></tr><tr><td>If not yet disclosed, indicate when and where it will be disclosed, if at all:</td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
